base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_turrets — a character (boss) from 1987 contra. Stage 1 end-boss 'Jungle Gate' — 2 rotating gun turrets flanking a central core. Player must destroy both turrets. 3-frame rotation-fire cycle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage 1 end-boss 'Jungle Gate' — 2 rotating gun turrets flanking a central core. Player must destroy both turrets. 3-frame rotation-fire cycle
